## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (unit or E2E)
- [ ] `src/types.ts` updated if shared types changed
- [ ] `data-testid` attributes added/kept for any new interactive elements
- [ ] No `any` types introduced without a comment explaining why
